title: croton microcalyx
intro: Croton microcalyx, also known as the bitter croton, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Croton microcalyx can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
